welcome.title: FleetTrack
welcome.subtitle: Mission control for your fleet — live positions, route planning, and the full visit lifecycle in one workspace. Here's what you can do.

map.title: Live Fleet Map
map.desc: See every driver moving, in real time.

visits.title: Planned Visits
visits.desc: Every stop tracked end to end.

billing.title: Onboarding & Billing
billing.desc: Workspace in seconds, plans that scale.

map.title: See every driver moving, live
map.desc: A real-time map of the whole fleet — markers, speed, route, and status streamed continuously over WebSockets. Click any driver for position, ETA, and a mini-map. The home screen for dispatchers.

visits.title: Every stop, tracked end to end
visits.desc: Each stop is a planned visit moving through pending → arrived → in progress → completed → departed. Geofencing auto-marks arrival and departure, and completing a visit flips its linked order's status automatically.

routes.title: Best order, least distance
routes.desc: Build the day's route from customer stops, then optimize the sequence using real road distances and a vehicle-routing solver. The route re-sequences with computed distance and duration in one click.

reports.title: Operational analytics, end to end
reports.desc: A reporting workspace with Overview KPIs, route drilldowns, driver and visit leaderboards, and timezone-aware date ranges. Export any view to CSV straight from the header.

history.title: Rewind any driver or route
history.desc: Replay historical positions and visit timelines from the time-series store. Pick a driver or route and a date range, then scrub the recorded path and every visit event along the way.

billing.title: A workspace in seconds
billing.desc: Self-serve signup spins up a workspace and a 14-day reverse trial — no card needed. Plans scale with your fleet, seats and features are enforced automatically, and Stripe handles checkout when you're ready.
